MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-16-2020 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, JUL-16-2020 HEARING HELD RE: PETITIONER KIPP BAY AREA SCHOOLS'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON PEREMPTORY WRIT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIV. PROC. SECTION 1094. THE COURT INSTRUCTS RESPONDENTS TO PROVIDE PETITIONER BY JULY 24, 2020 WITH THE DATA/INFORMATION DERIVED FROM THE CLASSROOM INVENTORY REGARDING THE FACILTIIES DISCUSSED. THE COURT INSTRUCTS THE PARTIES THEREAFTER TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFS BY JULY 30, 2020 TO ADDRESS: 1.) WHAT LIGHT IF ANY THE PROVIDED DATA/INFORMATION SHEDS ON THE ISSUE AND THE POTENTIAL MOOTNESS OF THIS CASE, AND 2.) WHAT ACTIONS THE BOARD TOOK AT THEIR JULY 28, 2020 MEETING AND WHAT EFFECTS IF ANY THOSE ACTIONS HAVE ON THIS CASE. THE COURT WILL TAKE THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION ON JULY 30, 2020. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: ROSE MILLER, CSR#5041, EMAIL: RMILLERCSR@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On Peremptory Writ Pursuant To Code Of Civ. Proc. Section 1094
Off Calendar Jul-20-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Atty. JOHN C. LEMMO, Esq. of Procopio, Cory, Hargreaves & Savitch LLP (Tel: 619-515-3294) for Petitioner KIPP Bay Area Schools;
Attys. JOHN R. YEH, Esq. of BURKE, WILLIAMS & SORENSEN, LLP (Tel: 408-606-6300 & TAMERA J. WONG, Esq. of San Francisco Unified School District (Tel: 415-241-6054) for Respondents San Francisco Unified School District; Board of Education of the San Francisco Unified School District; and Vincent Matthews.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER KIPP BAY AREA SCHOOLS'S Motion For Judgment On Peremptory Writ Pursuant To Code Of Civ. Proc. Section 1094.

Argument presented by counsel for the parties. The Court instructs respondents to provide petitioner by July 24, 2020 with the data/information derived from the classroom inventory regarding the faciltiies discussed. The Court instructs the parties thereafter to file supplemental briefs by July 30, 2020 to address: 1.) what light if any the provided data/information sheds on the issue and the potential mootness of this case, and 2.) what actions the Board took at their July 28, 2020 meeting and what effects if any those actions have on this case. The Court will take this matter under submission on July 30, 2020.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR#5041, email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On Peremptory Writ Pursuant To Code Of Civ. Proc. Section 1094
